el: Selected model is not supported. Please pick another.
en: Selected model is not supported. Please pick another.
zh: 所选模型不被支持，请重新选择。

el: Warning when the model is not in the supported list
en: Warning when the model is not in the supported list
zh: 不在支持列表中的模型提示

el: This model requires a first-frame image to generate the video.
en: This model requires a first-frame image to generate the video.
zh: 该模型需要上传首帧图片才能生成视频。

el: Warning when an image-to-video model lacks an image
en: Warning when an image-to-video model lacks an image
zh: 图生视频模型需要图片输入提示

el: This model is text-to-video only. Please remove the uploaded image.
en: This model is text-to-video only. Please remove the uploaded image.
zh: 该模型仅支持文生视频，请移除已上传的图片。

el: Warning when a text-only model is given an image
en: Warning when a text-only model is given an image
zh: 文生视频模型不接受图片输入提示

el: This resolution is not supported by the selected model.
en: This resolution is not supported by the selected model.
zh: 该分辨率不被当前模型支持。

el: Tooltip when a resolution chip is disabled for the current model
en: Tooltip when a resolution chip is disabled for the current model
zh: 分辨率不被当前模型支持的提示
